---
title: "Downloads"
subtitle: "Source code, notes, and PDFs from my work"
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: true
format:
  html:
    toc: false
---

<style>
/* ── Section / folder ── */
.dl-section { margin-bottom: 1rem; }

details.dl-folder {
  background: var(--background-secondary, #fff);
  border: 1px solid var(--border, #e0e0ec);
  border-radius: 10px;
  box-shadow: 0 2px 16px var(--shadow, rgba(90,103,216,0.07));
  overflow: hidden;
  transition: box-shadow 0.15s;
}
details.dl-folder[open] { box-shadow: 0 4px 24px rgba(90,103,216,0.11); }

details.dl-folder > summary {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 0.6rem;
  padding: 0.85rem 1.1rem;
  cursor: pointer;
  user-select: none;
  list-style: none;
  background: var(--accent-light, #ebedfa);
  transition: background 0.15s;
}
details.dl-folder > summary::-webkit-details-marker { display: none; }
details.dl-folder[open] > summary { border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border, #e0e0ec); }
details.dl-folder > summary:hover { background: #dde1f7; }

[data-quarto-color-scheme="dark"] details.dl-folder > summary:hover,
body.quarto-dark details.dl-folder > summary:hover {
  background: rgba(102,126,234,0.18) !important;
}

.dl-chevron {
  display: inline-block; width: 1rem; height: 1rem; flex-shrink: 0;
  color: var(--accent, #5a67d8); transition: transform 0.2s ease;
}
details.dl-folder[open] .dl-chevron { transform: rotate(90deg); }

.dl-folder-icon { color: var(--accent, #5a67d8); font-size: 1rem; flex-shrink: 0; }
.dl-folder-name {
  font-family: 'Source Serif 4', Georgia, serif;
  font-size: 0.95rem; font-weight: 400;
  color: var(--accent, #5a67d8); flex: 1;
}
.dl-folder-count { font-size: 0.7rem; color: var(--muted, #888); font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif; }

/* ── Table ── */
.dl-table { width: 100%; border-collapse: collapse; font-size: 0.875rem; }
.dl-table thead tr { background: transparent; }
.dl-table thead th {
  font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif; font-weight: 400; font-size: 0.7rem;
  letter-spacing: 0.06em; text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--muted, #888);
  padding: 0.55rem 1.1rem; text-align: left; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border, #e0e0ec);
}
.dl-table tbody tr { border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border, #e0e0ec); transition: background 0.12s; }
.dl-table tbody tr:last-child { border-bottom: none; }
.dl-table tbody tr:hover { background: var(--accent-light, #ebedfa); }
[data-quarto-color-scheme="dark"] .dl-table tbody tr:hover,
body.quarto-dark .dl-table tbody tr:hover { background: rgba(102,126,234,0.08) !important; }
.dl-table td { padding: 0.7rem 1.1rem; vertical-align: middle; color: var(--ink, #2d2d3a); }
.dl-table td.name { font-family: 'Source Serif 4', Georgia, serif; font-size: 0.9rem; }
.dl-table td.desc { color: var(--muted, #888); font-size: 0.82rem; }
.dl-table td.date { color: var(--muted, #888); font-size: 0.78rem; white-space: nowrap; }
.dl-table td.actions { white-space: nowrap; }

/* ── Tags & Buttons ── */
.dl-tag {
  display: inline-block; font-size: 0.62rem; padding: 0.1em 0.5em;
  border-radius: 3px; background: var(--accent-light, #ebedfa);
  color: var(--accent, #5a67d8); margin-left: 0.35rem; vertical-align: middle;
}
.dl-btn {
  display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.3rem;
  font-size: 0.72rem; font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif;
  padding: 0.25em 0.7em; border-radius: 4px; text-decoration: none;
  transition: background 0.15s, color 0.15s; margin-right: 0.3rem;
}
.dl-btn-pdf { background: var(--accent-light, #ebedfa); color: var(--accent, #5a67d8); border: 1px solid transparent; }
.dl-btn-pdf:hover { background: var(--accent, #5a67d8); color: #fff; }
.dl-btn-src { background: transparent; color: var(--muted, #888); border: 1px solid var(--border, #e0e0ec); }
.dl-btn-src:hover { background: var(--accent, #5a67d8); color: #fff; border-color: var(--accent, #5a67d8); }

/* ── Dark mode ── */
[data-quarto-color-scheme="dark"] details.dl-folder,
body.quarto-dark details.dl-folder { background: var(--background-secondary, #161820) !important; }
[data-quarto-color-scheme="dark"] details.dl-folder > summary,
body.quarto-dark details.dl-folder > summary { background: rgba(102,126,234,0.12) !important; }

@media (max-width: 600px) {
  .dl-table thead { display: none; }

  .dl-table tbody tr {
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    padding: 0.75rem 1rem;
    gap: 0.25rem;
  }

  .dl-table td {
    display: block;
    padding: 0;
    border: none;
  }

  .dl-table td.date,
  .dl-table td.actions {
    display: inline;
  }

  .dl-table td.date::after { content: "　"; }

  .dl-table td.name  { font-size: 0.92rem; margin-bottom: 0.1rem; }
  .dl-table td.desc  { font-size: 0.8rem; margin-bottom: 0.2rem; }
  .dl-table td.date  { font-size: 0.75rem; color: var(--muted, #888); }

  .dl-btn { font-size: 0.75rem; padding: 0.3em 0.8em; }
}
</style>

```{=html}
<div id="dl-root"></div>

<script>
// ============================================================
//  Edit here to customize sections, files, and links
// ============================================================
const SECTIONS = [
  {
    name: "Archived Scanned Notes",
    icon: "bi-folder2-open",
    open: true,
    files: [
      {
        title: "Electrodynamics_2024",
        tag:   "PDF",
        desc: 'Ref: <a href="https://space.bilibili.com/488198141" target="_blank">HIT Open Course</a> (Excl. Boundary Problems)',
        date:  "2024-05-18",
        links: [
          { type: "pdf", label: "PDF", icon: "bi-file-earmark-pdf", href: "downloads/Archived_Scanned_Notes/Electrodynamics_2024.pdf" },
        ]
      },
      /*{
        title: "Note2",
        tag:   "PDF",
        desc:  "Description for Note2",
        date:  "None yet",
        links: [
          { type: "pdf", label: "PDF", icon: "bi-file-earmark-pdf", href: "#" },
          { type: "source", label: "Source", icon: "bi-code", href: "#" },
        ]
      },*/
    ]
  },
  /*{
    name: "Code & Scripts",
    icon: "bi-folder2",
    open: false,
    files: [
      {
        title: "Code1",
        tag:   "Python",
        desc:  "Description for Code1",
        date:  "None yet",
        links: [
          { type: "source", label: "GitHub", icon: "bi-github",   href: "#" },
          { type: "pdf",    label: ".py",    icon: "bi-download", href: "#" },
        ]
      },
    ]
  },*/
];
// ============================================================
//  Don't edit below unless you know what you're doing! This part renders the sections and files based on the structure above.
// ============================================================

const CHEVRON_SVG = `<svg class="dl-chevron" viewBox="0 0 20 20" fill="currentColor">
  <path fill-rule="evenodd" d="M7.293 4.293a1 1 0 011.414 0L14 9.586l-5.293
  5.293a1 1 0 01-1.414-1.414L11.586 9.586 7.293 5.707a1 1 0 010-1.414z" clip-rule="evenodd"/>
</svg>`;

function renderBtn({ type, label, icon, href }) {
  const cls = type === "pdf" ? "dl-btn-pdf" : "dl-btn-src";
  return `<a class="dl-btn ${cls}" href="${href}"><i class="bi ${icon}"></i> ${label}</a>`;
}

function renderRow({ title, tag, desc, date, links }) {
  return `<tr>
    <td class="name">${title}<span class="dl-tag">${tag}</span></td>
    <td class="desc">${desc}</td>
    <td class="date" data-label="Date">${date}</td>
    <td class="actions" data-label="Download">${links.map(renderBtn).join("")}</td>
  </tr>`;
}

function renderSection({ name, icon, open, files }) {
  const rows   = files.map(renderRow).join("");
  const count  = files.length;
  const openAttr = open ? " open" : "";
  return `<div class="dl-section">
  <details class="dl-folder"${openAttr}>
    <summary>
      ${CHEVRON_SVG}
      <i class="bi ${icon} dl-folder-icon"></i>
      <span class="dl-folder-name">${name}</span>
      <span class="dl-folder-count">${count} file${count !== 1 ? "s" : ""}</span>
    </summary>
    <table class="dl-table">
      <thead><tr>
        <th style="width:30%">Title</th>
        <th>Description</th>
        <th style="width:9%">Date</th>
        <th style="width:16%">Download</th>
      </tr></thead>
      <tbody>${rows}</tbody>
    </table>
  </details>
</div>`;
}

document.getElementById("dl-root").innerHTML =
  SECTIONS.map(renderSection).join("\n");
</script>
```
